text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's morning at Tracen Academy. The students put
aside thoughts of running and pour their efforts
into studying.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Studyin' is boring as heck. I'd rather spend my time gettin' faster.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, I expect you to take this seriously. This is
one of our obligations as students.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: She's right, you know! I'm gonna study too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay, I hear you, geez. Um, let's see what
this question's about...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Please fill the blank with the appropriate phrase.
"Never put off until tomorrow..."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hah, how're ya supposed to figure that out? Pass!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That one's so easy. "Never put off until tomorrow
what you can do today."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? That's boring. How 'bout I make my own
saying?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Never put off until tomorrow—whatever, like I
care. See? Easy.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come on, guys. Aren't you forgetting the most
important thing?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sure, you can avoid putting things off, or not care
at all. But beyond all that...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Never put off until tomorrow what you can enjoy today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Enjoy...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yup. Every day we chase bigger and better
results. But in the middle of all that, we start to
forget...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing is to enjoy what every
day brings. So when a study session gets you
down, you gotta take a break!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Teio. You're just trying to wriggle your way out
of studying, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urk! Well, what would you write?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My answer would be, "What you can do today has
all been settled yesterday."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I may be number one, but she's zero and
center...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now we only have to wait to hear which of us
gave the most exemplary answer.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
So, the student who gave the best answer is...
Twin Turbo.

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wh-what did she write?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, my answer was, "Never put off until
tomorrow..."

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: What you're gonna do today!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, that's pretty good... I mean, it's simple, but
still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This can't be! You're telling us Turbo, with her
sheer enthusiasm alone, penned the best saying?!
